user.title: Add PlaiiinLight lamp
user.description: Enter the lamp's address. The lamp must already be on your network.

share_key.title: Share key required
share_key.description: {name} is claimed by an owner. Enter a share key minted by the owner (role "user" is enough).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate lamp
reauth_confirm.description: The share key for {name} was rejected (revoked, or the lamp was claimed). Enter a new share key.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the lamp
error.invalid_share_key: The lamp rejected this share key
